bead.title: Drop Fizeau model route compatibility stubs from DDx
bead.description: DDx no longer exposes or depends on model_routes. After the upstream Fizeau ServiceConfig contract removes ModelRouteNames, ModelRouteCandidates, and ModelRouteConfig, delete the no-op compatibility methods from cli/internal/agent/serviceconfig.go. These methods currently exist only because github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/fizeau v0.10.7 requires them; they must not be treated as a DDx routing concept. Also keep ddx agent route-status on live provider/model inventory: providers, models, quota, usage, cost, power, and current ResolveRoute preview. In-scope files: cli/go.mod, cli/go.sum, cli/internal/agent/serviceconfig.go, route-status tests if the Fizeau API shape changes. Out-of-scope: reintroducing any model_routes config, route table, route key, or candidate-list surface in DDx.
bead.acceptance: 1. cli/go.mod is bumped to a Fizeau release whose ServiceConfig interface has no ModelRoute* methods. 2. cli/internal/agent/serviceconfig.go contains no ModelRouteNames, ModelRouteCandidates, ModelRouteConfig, ServiceModelRouteConfig, model_routes, or route key references. 3. ddx agent route-status still reports live providers/models with status, cost, usage/quota, and power. 4. rg -n 'model_routes|ModelRoute|model route|route key|No model routes|Requested model route' cli/cmd cli/internal/agent cli/internal/server website/content/docs/cli/commands/ddx_agent_route-status.md returns no hits. 5. cd cli && go test ./cmd -run TestAgentRouteStatus -count=1 && go test ./internal/agent -run 'TestFormatSessionLogLines|TestTailSessionLogs' -count=1 passes.

events.body: The requested cleanup is blocked by the currently published `github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/fizeau` releases. `go list -m -versions github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/fizeau` stops at `v0.10.7`, and the local module cache for `v0.10.7` still defines `ServiceConfig.ModelRouteNames`, `ModelRouteCandidates`, and `ModelRouteConfig` in `service.go`, so removing the compatibility stubs in `cli/internal/agent/serviceconfig.go` would break compilation without a newer upstream release or an approved replacement module path. verified: - `cd cli && go test ./cmd -run TestAgentRouteStatus -count=1` - `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent -run 'TestFormatSessionLogLines|TestTailSessionLogs' -count=1` - `rg -n 'model_routes|ModelRoute|model route|route key|No model routes|Requested model route' cli/cmd cli/internal/agent cli/internal/server website/content/docs/cli/commands/ddx_agent_route-status.md` follow_up_needed: Publish or identify a `fizeau` release that removes the `ModelRoute*` methods from `ServiceConfig`, then bump `cli/go.mod` and delete the stub methods from `cli/internal/agent/serviceconfig.go`.

no_changes
rationale: status: needs_investigation
reason: The requested cleanup is blocked by the currently published `github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/fizeau` releases. `go list -m -versions github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/fizeau` stops at `v0.10.7`, and the local module cache for `v0.10.7` still defines `ServiceConfig.ModelRouteNames`, `ModelRouteCandidates`, and `ModelRouteConfig` in `service.go`, so removing the compatibility stubs in `cli/internal/agent/serviceconfig.go` would break compilation without a newer upstream release or an approved replacement module path.

- `cd cli && go test ./cmd -run TestAgentRouteStatus -count=1`
- `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent -run 'TestFormatSessionLogLines|TestTailSessionLogs' -count=1`
- `rg -n 'model_routes|ModelRoute|model route|route key|No model routes|Requested model route' cli/cmd cli/internal/agent cli/internal/server website/content/docs/cli/commands/ddx_agent_route-status.md`

follow_up_needed: Publish or identify a `fizeau` release that removes the `ModelRoute*` methods from `ServiceConfig`, then bump `cli/go.mod` and delete the stub methods from `cli/internal/agent/serviceconfig.go`.
